item.title: Comprehensive Imaging Evaluation and Staging of Crohn's Disease: When and Why to Use Intestinal Ultrasound, MRE, or CTE: Current Guidelines and Future Directions.
item.description: Diagnostics (Basel, Switzerland) - Review - Crohn's disease (CD) is a complex inflammatory bowel disease, defined by chronic transmural inflammation and marked heterogeneity in both anatomical distribution and disease behavior, with potentia...
